workloads.name: arithmetic
workloads.description: Integer-compatible accumulation over a 10,000-iteration numeric loop.

workloads.description: Repeated iterative Fibonacci calls using the common Lua 5.1 language subset.

workloads.name: mandelbrot
workloads.description: Floating-point Mandelbrot escape test over a fixed 48 by 48 grid.

workloads.name: control_flow
workloads.description: While, if/else, and repeat/until control flow without version-specific syntax.

workloads.name: function_calls
workloads.description: Fixed and variable-return Lua function calls.

workloads.name: table_access
workloads.description: Combined array and string-field table reads and writes.

workloads.name: sieve

workloads.name: string_integer_concat
workloads.description: Diagnostic-only string/integer conversion and concatenation without table traffic.

workloads.name: dense_string_array_set

workloads.name: table_concat_strings

workloads.name: table_concat_numbers
